data:
About
Practical Android apps for ordinary routines. Keelmark creates small, reliable tools that help people make clear decisions in everyday situations.
What Keelmark builds Keelmark products focus on routine tasks where a little clarity can remove a surprising amount of uncertainty. The first product is Dosewise, a medication timing and dose logging app for Android.
Design principles Clarity firstThe next useful action should be obvious. A good app should not need a training course.
Privacy by defaultPersonal information should stay personal wherever possible. Keelmark apps avoid unnecessary accounts, tracking, and data collection.
Focused featuresA product should earn its place on your phone by solving a real problem well.
Maintenance Keelmark aims to keep its apps maintained, documented, and understandable as Android and devices change over time.

Contact
Contact Keelmark For product questions, support, privacy queries, or administrative matters, use the email address below.
Email hello@keelmark.co.uk
For support, include the app name, device model, Android version, and a short description of the issue.

Privacy
Privacy Policy Keelmark products are designed to avoid unnecessary accounts, tracking, and data collection.
Summary Dosewise is designed as a local-first Android app. Medication records are intended to remain on your device unless a future feature clearly states otherwise and asks for the relevant permission.
Information stored Dosewise may store information you enter into the app, such as medication names, dose timing rules, and dose history. This information is used to provide the app's core functionality.
Analytics and diagnostics If analytics or crash reporting are added, this policy should be updated to identify the service, the information collected, and how users can control it.
Contact For privacy questions, contact hello@keelmark.co.uk.
This is a starter policy. Check it against the final app behaviour and Google Play requirements before publishing.

Products
Android apps from Keelmark. Keelmark products are practical tools for everyday routines. The first app is Dosewise.
Medication timing
Dosewise Record medication doses, check timing, and keep a clear history on Android.
View Dosewise Multiple medications Daily and weekly schedules Dose history Designed for local use

Dosewise
Medication timing and dose logging for Android. Dosewise helps you record medication doses, check when the next dose is due, and keep a clear dose history.
What it is for Medication can become so familiar that it is easy to forget whether you have just taken a dose. Dosewise is built around that ordinary problem: making the last recorded dose and next allowed dose easy to see.
Dosewise is not medical advice and does not decide what medication you should take. Medication instructions should come from your clinician, pharmacist, or the medicine label.
Core features Dose recordingRecord when a medication was taken and keep a history of previous doses.
Timing checksSee whether enough time has passed before the next dose.
Medication setupAdd medications with dose rules, daily limits, and schedule details.
Weekly routinesSupport for medicines taken on selected days rather than only daily intervals.
Readable historyA clear record helps answer the question: what happened today?
Local firstDesigned to work without an unnecessary account.
Availability Dosewise is being prepared for Android. Replace the placeholder badge with the official Google Play badge and link when the listing is live.
